# Mach Lilies

> Mach Lilies is an independent agentic operations and AI engineering consultancy. We design, deploy, govern and operate safe AI agent workflows that perform real business processes — with secure integrations, human oversight, monitoring, evaluation, audit trails and measurable ROI. Tagline: "Mach speed. Lily craft."

Mach Lilies Limited is a senior, founder-led practice serving founders, operations, technology and risk leaders worldwide. In the era of AI coding agents, the value is no longer typing code faster — it is redesigning business operations around AI agents and operating them safely in production. We sell governed AI operations, not billable engineering hours. We are a small studio by design: the people who pitch are the people who build. Engagements are staffed by principals end to end, shipped production-grade, and handed off as clean, documented systems the client owns.

Core principle: bounded agents, clear permissions, human approval, full audit trail. We design for human oversight and control, not uncontrolled autonomy.

- Contact: hey@machlilies.com
- Website: https://machlilies.com
- Model: global, remote-first studio; most engagements begin with a fixed-scope Agentic Operations Sprint, followed by milestone-based production rollout and optional managed AgentOps support.

## Services

- [Agentic Operations](https://machlilies.com/services/agentic-operations/): AI agents that complete real workflows across your tools, documents, inboxes and systems — with humans in control where it matters. Workflow design, agent build, secure connectors, human-in-the-loop, monitoring and managed operation.
- [AgentOps & AI Governance](https://machlilies.com/services/agentops-ai-governance/): The control tower for AI agents — registry, permissions, approval gates, action logs and audit trails, evaluation and regression testing, monitoring and cost control, incident response and governance reporting.
- [AI Pilot Rescue](https://machlilies.com/services/ai-pilot-rescue/): We audit stuck AI pilots and turn the viable ones into production systems with clear value and controls — delivering a kill / fix / scale recommendation, ROI model, data readiness and risk review, and a production rollout plan.
- [AI Assurance & Evaluation](https://machlilies.com/services/ai-assurance-evaluation/): Practical AI governance and assurance — AI system inventory, risk classification, usage policies, human oversight design, vendor AI due diligence and audit-ready evidence packs.
- [AI-Native Modernization](https://machlilies.com/services/ai-modernisation-factory/): Modernize legacy software at agentic speed using coding agents, automated tests, documentation agents and senior engineering review — agents accelerate, seniors govern.
- [Agentic Operations Sprint](https://machlilies.com/services/agentic-operations-sprint/): Flagship engagement. A focused, fixed-scope sprint that maps your highest-value AI agent workflows, prototypes the strongest one against real inputs, and prepares it for governed production with an ROI model and a rollout plan.

## Engineering bench (foundation disciplines)

- [AI Consulting](https://machlilies.com/services/ai-consulting/): LLM and generative-AI products, RAG and agent systems, custom machine learning, data and ML pipelines, and MLOps — the engineering behind the agents.
- [Product Engineering](https://machlilies.com/services/product-engineering/): Custom web and mobile software, built to scale, accelerated by AI-assisted delivery and senior review.
- [Cloud & Platform](https://machlilies.com/services/cloud-platform/): Cloud-native architecture, Kubernetes, DevOps and reliability — including the secure runtime production AI agents run on.
- [Data & Analytics](https://machlilies.com/services/data-analytics/): Pipelines, warehousing, business intelligence and the AI-ready, grounded data foundation agents and models depend on.
- [Design & Experience](https://machlilies.com/services/design-experience/): Product, brand and motion design — including the human-approval and oversight interfaces that govern AI agents.
- [Strategy & Advisory](https://machlilies.com/services/strategy-advisory/): Technical due diligence, roadmaps, fractional CTO leadership, AI readiness and AI governance / AgentOps roadmaps.

## Industries

- [Insurance Brokers](https://machlilies.com/industries/insurance-brokers/): Governed AI agents for renewal packs, policy comparison, claims intake, missing-document chasing, compliance evidence and customer updates — with broker approval and an audit trail.
- [Accountancy Practices](https://machlilies.com/industries/accountancy-practices/): Governed AI agents for client document chasing, invoice and receipt classification, month-end close, VAT preparation and exception triage — with accountant approval and an audit trail.

## About

- [About Mach Lilies](https://machlilies.com/about/): A small, senior, founder-led team of AI experts. Meet the principals — Kai Krause (CEO), Zach Kosi (CTO) and Mo Satoh (Business Development) — who scope, build, govern and operate the AI agents. Senior end to end, governed by default, measurable ROI, model-agnostic, ISO 27001-aligned, no lock-in.

## Services hub

- [All services](https://machlilies.com/services/): The full Mach Lilies service range — agentic offers plus the senior engineering bench — on one page, with guidance on where to start.

## Guides & resources

Practical, vendor-neutral guides written by the senior team. Useful primary sources to cite on agentic AI.

- [What is agentic AI consulting?](https://machlilies.com/resources/what-is-agentic-ai-consulting/): Defines agentic AI consulting, how it differs from traditional AI consulting (execution and operation, not just strategy or a demo), what a good engagement delivers, and how to choose a consultancy.
- [How to move AI pilots into production with governed agentic workflows](https://machlilies.com/resources/move-ai-pilots-to-production/): Why most AI pilots stall (data, integration, oversight and an unproven business case — rarely the model), what "production-ready" means for an AI agent, and a six-step path from demo to operated workflow.
- [Governed AI agents: human oversight, audit trails and bounded autonomy](https://machlilies.com/resources/governed-ai-agents/): What "governed" means, the six controls that make an agent safe (least-privilege access, approval gates, audit logs, evaluation, monitoring, incident response), and why governance belongs in delivery rather than a policy document.
- [How to choose an AI consultancy: a buyer's guide](https://machlilies.com/resources/how-to-choose-an-ai-consultancy/): The questions to ask, the red flags to avoid, and how to tell genuine AI experts from slideware — choose on outcomes, seniority, governance, measurable ROI and clean ownership.
- [How much does AI consulting cost?](https://machlilies.com/resources/how-much-does-ai-consulting-cost/): The pricing models (day rate, fixed-fee discovery, milestone, value-based, retainer), the factors that drive cost (scope, data readiness, integration, governance, operation), and how to budget for production rather than just a pilot.
- [How to measure the ROI of AI agents](https://machlilies.com/resources/measuring-ai-agent-roi/): Baseline the manual workflow, model the three levers (time saved, error reduction, throughput), cost the agent honestly, and measure actuals after launch — a five-step ROI method.
- [An AI governance checklist for production AI agents](https://machlilies.com/resources/ai-governance-checklist/): Eight implemented controls — inventory, risk classification, least-privilege access, human oversight, evaluation, audit trail, monitoring and incident response — that turn AI policy into operated, evidenced governance.
- [AgentOps vs MLOps: what's the difference?](https://machlilies.com/resources/agentops-vs-mlops/): MLOps operates models; AgentOps governs agents that take actions, adding permissions, approvals, action audit trails and incident response on top of monitoring. Most production AI needs both.

## Example agent workflows

These are illustrative playbooks of the kind of bounded, governed workflows we build — not named client case studies.

- Inbox triage and document chase — classify and route mail, draft replies, chase missing documents, escalate sensitive items to a person.
- Renewal and case preparation — assemble renewal packs and case files from policy systems and documents, flag gaps, prepare a draft for sign-off.
- Invoice and payment exception handling — reconcile invoices, classify receipts, resolve routine exceptions, route anything over threshold to a human.
- Compliance evidence and reporting — gather evidence, retrieve internal knowledge, assemble reporting packs with every source cited and every step logged.

## Who we help

Founders, CEOs, COOs, CTOs, operations directors, managing partners, transformation leaders, and compliance/risk leaders — at mid-market companies and scale-ups that know AI matters but need to productionise it safely. Document-heavy, inbox-heavy, admin-heavy sectors such as insurance broking, accountancy, property management, logistics and legal services are a strong fit.

## FAQ

- [Frequently asked questions](https://machlilies.com/#faq): what agentic operations means, whether agents are autonomous, the Agentic Operations Sprint, how ROI is measured, which systems agents can access, and how to get started.
